introSection: Bruco Miniottovolante is a steel family roller coaster built by Italian manufacturer D.P.V. Rides currently located at Zoosafari Fasanolandia in Fasano, Apulia, Italy.

sections.title: Trains
sections.content: The train is designed to resemble a Caterpillar.

fullText:
Bruco Miniottovolante is a steel family roller coaster built by Italian manufacturer D.P.V. Rides currently located at Zoosafari Fasanolandia in Fasano, Apulia, Italy.



Yellow track and green supports.

The train is designed to resemble a Caterpillar.
